failures.description: The agent failed to include item 2299424241, priced at 237.48, which also satisfies the condition cost more than $233.90.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for all available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The tool output at step 3 returned five matching available RGB keyboards, of which two have prices greater than $233.90: item 1151293680 at 272.33 and item 2299424241 at 237.48. At step 4, the Executor synthesized an answer using only item 1151293680 and omitted item 2299424241, despite the relevant evidence being present in the tool output. This is a partial/incorrect interpretation of tool output, not an invalid invocation, unsupported intent, or underspecified request.
